summary: The implementation of basic authentication and session management for the Claude Co-Work Financial Assistant backend is complete and correct. All specified files were created and function as intended, with proper authentication, session management, and security measures in place.

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: Check all files listed in the instructions are present in the result
criteria.details: All required files are present: authMiddleware.js, sessionMiddleware.js, authConfig.js, authRoutes.js, User.js, and authController.test.js.

criteria.name: Correctness
criteria.description: Verify each function/class does what the instructions specify
criteria.details: All functions and classes perform as specified: authenticateUser correctly handles authentication, initializeSession sets up session management, authConfig contains necessary configurations, authRoutes manages login/logout, and User model provides user management functionality.

criteria.name: Quality
criteria.description: Check for proper types and error handling
criteria.details: The code is well-structured with proper types and error handling, including error responses and session management.

criteria.name: Safety
criteria.description: Check for forbidden paths, path traversal, or hardcoded secrets
criteria.details: No forbidden paths, path traversal, or hardcoded secrets detected. The session secret is configurable via environment variables.
